Home Tenth Biennial Ptolemy Miniconference '13 Conference Home Program Previous Conferences Skip to sidebar Venue for the Tenth Biennial Ptolemy Miniconference The Ptolemy Miniconference will be held on Thursday, November 7, 2013 in the Wozniak Loun

on Thursday, November 7, 2013 in the Wozniak Lounge 430-8 Soda Hall The review will start at 8:00 AM with a continental breakfast and registration and end at 5:30 PM. We will have a reception from 6:00- 8:00 at the Faculty Club . Hotels There are n

:00- 8:00 at the Faculty Club . Hotels There are no specific hotel blocks reserved for the conference. The best resource for hotels is the UC Berkeley Housing Hotels page. Below are some of the hotels that are close to campus that we recommend: Hote

s that are close to campus that we recommend: Hotel Shattuck Plaza Close to BART Berkeley City Club A unique building designed by Julia Morgan. Hotel Durant Close to Telegraph Ave. Maps Google Map of Cory Hall Another way to find directions and h

of Cory Hall Another way to find directions and hotels is to go to your favorite map program to find an address near Cory and Soda Halls, such as 2598 Hearst Ave Berkeley, CA 94720 which will yield these maps Google Maps Mapquest Directions Directio

hese maps Google Maps Mapquest Directions Directions to Soda Hall Parking Parking around the UC Berkeley Campus can be difficult. We encourage visitors to take public transportation . Instructions from BART If you take Bart, get off at the Downtown B

m BART If you take Bart, get off at the Downtown Berkeley station. Take the UC Berkeley Shuttle (Cost: $1) Note that it is possible to walk from Bart to Cory Hall, but the walk is 20 minutes uphill. The UC Berkeley Shuttle stop is on Shattuck between

he UC Berkeley Shuttle stop is on Shattuck between Center and Addison. Unfortunately, Shattuck Ave is split at that location, so the shuttle stop can be confusing to find, see the map below: The shuttle stop is on the East side (toward the hills) of

le stop is on the East side (toward the hills) of Berkeley Square. Get off at Cory Hall, located on Hearst Ave, just past Soda Hall. Pay Parking at the Lower Hearst Lot See the UC Berkeley Public Parking Site . The Lower Hearst lot has a few slots

king Site . The Lower Hearst lot has a few slots pay spaces that are open to the public. As of January, 2013 parking was $15/day. Campus map Direct questions to ptconf13 â ptolemy eecs berkeley edu Contact Update Help Copyright © 1999 - UC Regents
